docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY KENNEY, MARYANNE AS TO DEFENDANT DELONG, MATTHEW SCOTT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2014 - JUDGMENT.
